name: Phoebe
description: She is an [[Order of the Deep#Acolyte|Acolyte]] of the Order of the Deep. A young woman of quiet devotion and compassionate, nurturing nature, she upholds the teachings of her faith with unwavering diligence. Raised her entire life as a devout Acolyte, she extends her heartfelt kindness to everyone she meets with her good graces and unquestionable reverence to Sentinel Imperator.
